01005.name: Wendy Adams
01005.text:
[reaction] When you reveal a chaos token, choose and discard 1 card from your hand: Cancel that chaos token and return it to the bag. Reveal a new chaos token. (Limit once per test/ability.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If Wendy's Amulet is in play, you automatically succeed instead.

01015.name: Abandoned and Alone
01015.text: Revelation - Take 2 direct horror and remove all cards in your discard pile from the game.

01046.name: Pickpocketing
01046.text: [reaction] After you evade an enemy, exhaust Pickpocketing: Draw 1 card.

01048.name: Leo De Luca
01048.text: You may take an additional action during your turn.

01050.name: Elusive
01050.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Disengage from each enemy engaged with you and move to a revealed location with no enemies.

01051.name: Backstab
01051.text: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. This attack deals +2 damage.

01076.name: Stray Cat
01076.text: [fast] Discard Stray Cat: Automatically evade a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location.

01077.name: Dig Deep
01077.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

01079.name: "Look what I found!"
01079.text:
Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less while investigating.
Discover 2 clues in your location.

01080.name: Lucky!
01080.text:
Fast. Play when you would fail a skill test.
Get +2 to your skill value for that test.

01087.name: Flashlight
01087.text: Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. Your location gets -2 shroud for this investigation.

01090.name: Perception
01090.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01096.name: Amnesia
01096.text: Revelation - Choose and discard all but 1 card from your hand.

01117.name: Lita Chantler
01117.text:
While you control Lita Chantler, she gains:
"Each investigator at your location gets +1 [combat].
[reaction] When an investigator at your location successfully attacks a [[Monster]] enemy: That investigator deals +1 damage."

01122.name: Time Is Running Short
01122.text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

01123.name: Uncovering the Conspiracy
01123.text: [action] The investigators spend 2 clues per investigator, as a group: Draw the top card of the Cultist deck. Objective - Find as many unique [[Cultist]] enemies as you can and add them to the victory display. If there are 6 unique [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display, advance. (Note: Not all 6 of them are in the Cultist deck.)

01124.name: Your House
01124.text: Forced - When the Ghoul Priest spawns: Spawn it here instead of at its normal location. [action]: Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource. (Limit once per turn.)

01127.name: Southside
01127.text: [action]: Search your deck for an [[Ally]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck. (Limit once per game.)

01132.name: Easttown
01132.text: While you are in Easttown, reduce the cost of each [[Ally]] asset you play by 2.

01133.name: Graveyard
01133.text: Forced - After you enter the Graveyard: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must either take 2 horror or move to Rivertown.

01134.name: Northside
01134.text: [action] Spend 5 resources: Gain 2 clues from the token pool. (Group limit once per game.)

01135.name: Hunting Shadow
01135.text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): Spend 1 clue or take 2 damage.

01167.name: Crypt Chill
01167.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, choose and discard 1 asset you control (if you cannot, take 2 damage instead).

01172.name: Hunting Nightgaunt
01172.text:
Hunter.
While attempting to evade Hunting Nightgaunt, double the negative modifier of each revealed chaos token.

01173.name: On Wings of Darkness
01173.text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage. Then, disengage with each non-[[Nightgaunt]] enemy engaged with you and move to a [[Central]] location.

50026a.name: Predator or Prey?
50026a.text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

50026b.name: Narôgath
50026b.text:
Spawn - Engaged with Prey.
Prey - Nearest to another [[Cultist]] enemy.
Hunter.
Narôgath gets +3 health per investigator.
While Narôgath is ready, each investigator at its location or a connecting location cannot Parley with [[Cultist]] enemies.

50029.name: Miskatonic University
50029.text: [action] Take 2 horror: Gain 1 clue from the token pool. (Limit once per game.)

50031.name: Masked Horrors
50031.text: Revelation - Each investigator with 2 or more clues takes 2 horror. If no horror is dealt by this effect, place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

50041.name: Disciple of the Devourer
50041.text:
Spawn - Farthest empty location.
Forced - After you spawn Disciple of the Devourer: You must either place 1 doom on it or place 1 of your clues on its location. If the current agenda is not agenda 1, do both instead.

50043.name: Mask of Umôrdhoth
50043.text:
Revelation - Attach to the farthest [[Cultist]] enemy and place 1 doom on that enemy. If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Cultist]] enemy, draw it, and attach Mask of Umôrdhoth to it. Shuffle the encounter deck.
Attached enemy gets +2 health. If attached enemy is unique, it gains retaliate. If it is non-unique, it gains aloof instead.

50044.name: Jeremiah Pierce
50044.text:
Spawn - Your House. Otherwise, Rivertown.
[action]: Parley. Add Jeremiah Pierce to the victory display. Then, test [willpower] (4). Place 1 doom on the current agenda for each point you fail by (this can cause the current agenda to advance).
